title: The Vanishing Train of 1925

scenes.text: A train carrying valuables mysteriously disappeared without a trace.
It happened in Pennsylvania, along the tracks of the Pennsylvania Railroad.
In 1925, a freight train carrying jewels vanished en route.
The mystery of the missing train remains unsolved to this day.
Despite searches, the train and its cargo were never found.
scenes.label: NEVER FOUND

scenes.text: Follow for daily true crime mysteries.

description: 📍 Pennsylvania, USA - 1925. A freight train loaded with jewels vanished mysteriously, and the case remains unsolved. Follow for daily cold cases!
